news.paragraph: USO is experiencing a surge in attention as oil prices are highlighted as being in a significant upswing. The headline suggests that many investors may be overlooking this trend, implying a potential opportunity. Traders should consider the current commodity price environment and any upcoming economic data that could influence oil markets.

headlines.title: Oil Is Having A Moment — And You're Likely Missing Out
